title: The Escape from Egghead Tightens
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Warcury, Unknown person #3, Vegapunk as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I wanted our paths to cross...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You were here, right, Joy Boy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Now... what the hell is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What's the deal with this crazy island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He was cut off mid- sentence!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: What could've caused the broadcast's termination?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that I think about it... what could've killed a genius like vegapunk in the first place?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...don't tell me... someone's had him killed?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He did say he committed grave sins...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but the government wouldn't just erase him... would they?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, no way! Remember what was happening before all this!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy was holding him hostage!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is obviously the work of those dastardly pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The World Government would never kill off the world's greatest mind, even if he did break a few laws!!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
